name: Claim denied after knee injury at work in Taylorsville, what now?
description: Appeal via Conference or hearing—get lawyer help.[1]

mainEntity.name: Claim denied after knee injury at work in Taylorsville, what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal via Conference or hearing—get lawyer help.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Request a Claims Resolution Conference or file for hearing with Utah Labor Commission.** Insurer must decide within 21-45 days; appeal if denied.[1] Key factors: Gather more evidence like doctor reports. Deadlines apply. Consider attorney for formal process. Persistence often resolves disputes.
